items.title: The San Antonio Spurs tendered two-way qualifying offers to Harrison Ingram and David Jones Garcia, a league source told @spotrac.com.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
The San Antonio Spurs tendered two-way qualifying offers to Harrison Ingram and David Jones Garcia, a league source told @spotrac.com.

Both players will now be restricted free agents this offseason.
